content.en:
In line with Black Wind Mountain's actions, the Heavenly Emperor Palace also knew about the Devouring Clan, and also sent the Half-Step Domain Ancestors to find the Devouring Clan.

After all, the Heavenly Emperor Palace didn't want to let the Devouring Clan grow, once the Devouring Clan grew, then it would definitely be aimed at the Xuanxu Ancient Realm.

Once the Xuanxu Ancient Realm is devoured, even if they can survive, they will have no foundation, and their plans will be completely destroyed.

Therefore, they must stop the Devourer.

......

Xuanxu Ancient Realm, a mysterious small world, three figures were shrouded in mist, and they came here to gather.

"The identity of our Devourer has been discovered, who has leaked the whereabouts?"

One of them spoke.

"I didn't take action, although we Devouring Clan can only grow quickly by devouring the world in large quantities, we can also cultivate. During these years, I only occasionally devoured some nascent worlds and universes, and most of the time I spent my time in retreat and penance. This matter has nothing to do with me, hehe, I'm also an ancient devouring clan, our devouring clan was too arrogant to be almost wiped out, I can remember the lesson, don't dare to expose it casually!"

"It's not me, my cultivation has reached a limit, and I have to devour the worlds above the top Dao Realm to progress, and there are so many top Dao Realms in the Dao Mountain Realm, once I devour one, it will be easy to be exposed, so it's not me!"

"It should be a new Devouring Clan, but it is very difficult for our Devouring Clan to be born, if there is no help from the Devouring Clan's predecessors, relying on self-evolution to form a human form, it is enough to be comparable to the Devouring Saint Ancestor of our Devouring Clan!"

"We ourselves have to carefully devour one world after another, where will we cultivate another Devourer to seize our resources?"

"If it's not the three of us, it's unlikely that the Devourers have evolved by themselves, but there are other Devourers infiltrating them?"

"Very likely, do you think it will be the Devouring Clan of the Daoshan Realm?"

"Are you saying that the Mountain Realm itself gave birth to the Devouring Clan? Unlikely, where was the Devouring Clan so easily born?"

The three Devourers discussed for a long time, but nothing came to their senses.

But they decided to keep a lower profile and no longer devour a world, in case they took the blame for the devouring clan who made trouble, then it would be called wronged!

......

After Ye Tian returned from the Wind Mountain, he also began to look for the Devouring Clan.

"There should be a Devouring Clan in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and others can't recognize the Devouring Clan, unless they fight with the Devouring Clan, once the Devouring Clan is hidden, it is no different from a normal creature. But the Devourer will definitely not be able to hide my copy talent, and once I continue to use the copy talent to investigate, I may be able to find traces of the Devourer!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian had been letting the Replicating Body use the Replication Talent to explore the creatures in the territory in the outside world.

He didn't believe that the Devourers could endure the retreat, and once they came out to move, they might be discovered by him.

Year after year, Ye Tian has not found anything, and the Black Wind Mountain and the Heavenly Emperor Palace have not made any big gains in the Dao Mountain realm, obviously the Devouring Clan is very deeply hidden, and it is not so easy to discover.

In the blink of an eye, thousands of years have passed.

Ye Tian has explored the Xuanxu Ancient Realm for thousands of years, I don't know how many territories he has explored, and even some places have been explored back and forth dozens of times, but he has never gained anything, but he has gained some Dao-level natal talents, but it is of little use to him, but it can be given to others in the future.

this day.

Ye Tian descended on a starry sky continent, and the copying talent shrouded the entire continent, and through screening, he was able to determine whether there was a devouring clan here.

Suddenly, a person's talent situation attracted Ye Tian's attention.

Devourer: Kurosaki

Devouring Talent: Dao Level

World Talent: Dao Level

Source Force Talent: Super God Level

Source Talent: Super God Level

Source Speed Talent: Super God Level

Dark Talent: Super God Level

......

"Devourer, finally found!"

Ye Tian was very excited, but he didn't do it immediately.

Because the strength of this Devouring Clan is not weak, through the situation detected by the Replication Talent and the introduction of this Devouring Clan, this is a Devouring Clan at the half-step domain ancestor level in the Ten Thousand Things Realm, which is a little stronger than his strength estimates.

Therefore, with his own strength, he could not help this Devourer, and once he did it, this Devourer would definitely escape.

When the time comes, it will be difficult for him to find the Devourer again.

Immediately, he summoned the Flame Crack Dao Ancestor to say that he had discovered the traces of a Devouring Clan, and his strength was estimated to be at the level of the Half-Step Domain Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Things Realm.

Windy Mountain.

The Flame Crack Dao Ancestor received Ye Tian's summons and hurriedly informed the Wind Mountain Lord.

"Mountain Lord, the Ten Thousand Things Dao Ancestor has sent a message, he has found the Devouring Clan, and said that the Devouring Clan has the strength of the Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, I don't know if this information is true!"

The Mountain Lord of Wind Mountain said in a low voice: "Whether it's true or not, wouldn't it be better to take a look?" Anyway, for us Black Wind Mountain, even if it is an intelligence mistake, there is no loss!"

"Jinchen!"

"Wind Void!"

"Styx!"

"The three of you go with Yan Rift, if the information is true, be sure to catch that Devouring Clan, and don't let the people from the Heavenly Emperor Palace take the lead!" ordered the Wind Mountain Lord.

Whoa!!

The three Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors walked out of the void and came to the Wind Mountain Lord, arching their hands and saying, "Yes, Mountain Lord!"

Immediately, Jinchen Dao Ancestor, Wind Void Dao Ancestor, Stygian Sea Dao Ancestor plus Yan Crack Dao Ancestor, a total of four Ten Thousand Things Realm half-step domain ancestors went to the place where Ye Tian was.

Soon, they came to Ye Tian's side.

"I've seen four Dao Ancestors!"

Ye Tian said politely.

Yan Crack Dao Ancestor asked, "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, where is the Devouring Clan of the Ten Thousand Things Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor level that you mentioned?"

"Right there?"

Ye Tian locked onto the Devouring Clan, Kurosaki, through his breath.

Suddenly, the Flame Splitting Dao Ancestor and their divine sense locked on Kurosaki.

Kurosaki was drinking tea in a famous mortal restaurant at the moment, and was suddenly locked by the breath, and he was suddenly a little panicked.

"What's the panic, it is estimated that a few half-step domain ancestors are a little curious to see me, a half-step domain ancestor, appear in such a mortal city, and they don't know my identity, as long as I don't expose it, they won't know that I am a devouring clan!"

Kurosaki thought to himself.
